findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: The word 'Everyone' loses its bold emphasis in the HTML conversion. In the PDF, 'Everyone' is clearly bolded to highlight the specific chat option Commission Members must select to comply with open meetings law.
findings.evidence: PDF page 2: '...chat box to chat with **Everyone**, which will include the public...' — 'Everyone' is bold. HTML: 'with Everyone, which will include the public...' — 'Everyone' appears in regular weight, indistinguishable from surrounding text.
